overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring a rain-soaked Gotham City at night. The character walks through neon-lit streets past gothic architecture, including a cathedral, Union Station, and various commercial establishments while carrying a weapon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with gothic cathedral view

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through rain-soaked streets toward the illuminated gothic cathedral building ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the left side of the street
massive gothic-style building with illuminated windows towering in the distance
red and white neon signage on building facades reflecting on wet pavement
dark vehicles parked along the left curb
tall street lamp casting yellow light on the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The character begins in an open urban plaza at night during heavy rain, walking toward a massive gothic cathedral visible in the distance. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the wet streets while parked cars line the left side of the road.

events.description: character turns right into narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings

agents.ego_description: character turns right and proceeds through the narrow covered passage between buildings

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with weathered texture forming the left side of the alley
arched doorway with stone surround on the right building facade
black metal fence or railing along the right side of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow alleyway sheltered from the rain, flanked by tall brick buildings with arched doorways. The space is enclosed and dimly lit compared to the open plaza, creating a confined corridor leading back to the main streets.

events.description: exits narrow alley back onto main street with Union Station visible ahead
city bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: character walks along the wet avenue passing street furniture and approaching the illuminated transit station

notable_agents.action: distant figure holding an umbrella walking across the street ahead
city bus driving along the wet road and passing the character

entered.detail: large building with illuminated 'Union Station' signage on the facade
white and blue public transit bus moving along the street
single parking meter on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character returns to the rain-exposed main avenue where Union Station stands ahead. A city bus passes by on the right while a lone pedestrian with an umbrella crosses in the distance, and the wet streets reflect the surrounding city lights.

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection
passing parked delivery vans under the elevated train tracks

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wet intersection and continues past parked delivery vehicles under the overpass

entered.detail: white delivery van with blue 'VS' logo parked along the curb
modern glass facade of commercial building on the left
elevated train tracks or highway structure spanning across the street ahead
red neon sign for 'Big Belly Burger' restaurant
metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wet intersection and enters a commercial district with parked delivery vans and glass storefronts. The Big Belly Burger neon sign becomes visible on the left as the character passes beneath the elevated train tracks.

events.description: character slows and stops to look around the intersection
character turns to face different directions surveying the area

agents.ego_description: character pauses at the intersection, looking around at the neon signs and wet streets while holding a weapon

entered.detail: illuminated sign for 'Gotham City Bank' on the right side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at a wide intersection featuring the Big Belly Burger restaurant and Gotham City Bank, both marked by bright neon signage. The character stops to survey the rain-soaked streets, looking around the desolate urban environment before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban landscape that shifts from open gothic plazas to confined alleyways and finally into a neon-lit commercial district. It begins in a wide plaza under heavy rain, moving past parked cars and digital billboards toward a massive gothic cathedral in the distance. As the character turns away from the open square, the scene contracts into a dimly lit, sheltered brick alleyway before emerging once more into the downpour on a main avenue facing Union Station. The camera then glides across a wet intersection past a passing city bus and beneath elevated train tracks, where the environment transitions into a commercial zone marked by glass storefronts and delivery vans. Finally, the movement opens up at a wide intersection dominated by the bright neon signs of Big Belly Burger and Gotham City Bank, where the character stops to survey the desolate, shimmering streets.
